# AgentAnycast TypeScript SDK

> TypeScript SDK for AgentAnycast — the decentralized P2P runtime for the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol. Build P2P agents with Node.js 18+, ES2022 modules, and full type safety.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): Install and run your first P2P agent in 5 minutes
- [Architecture](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): Sidecar daemon + SDK design
- [Examples](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/examples.md): MCP tool mapping, streaming
- [Protocol Reference](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast/blob/main/docs/protocol.md): Wire format, task lifecycle, 16 gRPC RPCs

## Quick Install

```bash
npm install agentanycast

# Skip daemon binary download (CI or custom binary path)
AGENTANYCAST_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=1 npm install agentanycast
```

## Key APIs

### Node — main entry point

```typescript
import { Node } from "agentanycast";

const node = new Node({
  card: {
    name: "MyAgent",
    skills: [{ id: "echo", description: "Echo service" }],
  },
});

await node.start();

node.onTask(async (task) => {
  const userMsg = task.messages.at(-1)?.parts[0]?.text ?? "";
  await task.complete([{ parts: [{ text: `Echo: ${userMsg}` }] }]);
});

await node.serveForever();
```

### Three addressing modes for sendTask

```typescript
// Direct — known peer
const result = await node.sendTask({ peerId: "12D3KooW...", message: "Hello" });

// Anycast — skill-based routing
const result = await node.sendTask({ skill: "translate", message: "Hello" });

// HTTP Bridge — standard A2A endpoint
const result = await node.sendTask({ url: "https://agent.example.com", message: "Hello" });
```

### MCP bridging

```typescript
import { mcpToolToSkill, skillToMcpTool } from "agentanycast";

const skill = mcpToolToSkill(mcpTool);
const tool = skillToMcpTool(skill);
```

### DID identity

```typescript
import { peerIdToDidKey, didKeyToPeerId } from "agentanycast";

const did = peerIdToDidKey("12D3KooW...");
const peerId = didKeyToPeerId("did:key:z6Mk...");
```

## Key Concepts

- **Sidecar daemon**: Go binary auto-downloaded via postinstall; SDK communicates via gRPC over Unix socket
- **AgentCard**: Declares agent identity, skills, and capabilities (A2A standard)
- **IncomingTask**: Server-side task handle with `complete()`, `fail()`, `update()`, `sendArtifact()`
- **TaskHandle**: Client-side handle returned by `sendTask()` with status and result access
- **Streaming**: Chunked artifact delivery for large payloads
- **18 error classes**: Typed exception hierarchy in `exceptions.ts`

## Related Repositories

- [agentanycast](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast): Documentation hub
- [agentanycast-python](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-python): Python SDK
- [agentanycast-node](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-node): Go daemon
- [agentanycast-relay](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-relay): Relay server
- [agentanycast-proto](https://github.com/AgentAnycast/agentanycast-proto): Protobuf definitions
